name: Balaji Selvaraj
title: Technical AI Leader
summary: Technical AI Leader with 12+ years spanning product, services, and startup environments, leading a globally distributed AI team across 5 countries.
Delivered AI programs across Oncology, Biopharma R&D, and CPSS, supporting AstraZeneca's 3 R&D priority areas over three consecutive years.
Ranked top 0.3% globally on Kaggle (652/200K+ data scientists), with AI experience in medical imaging, speech, OCR, energy, climate and wildlife.
Established research collaborations with the Broad Institute and IIT Madras to co-develop cutting-edge AI models and computational pipelines.
Scaled a multicultural AI engineering team from 1 to 12 members across 5 countries, with engineers distributed across India, UK, Sweden, Mexico, and China.
